Interface IDatabaseLockInfo

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesGDB
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesGDB.dll

Infomation about database locks.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("58F47253-0F9D-4E59-A573-6A3267D0810C")]
public interface IDatabaseLockInfo

Properties

DatasetType

The type of the locked dataset, if it is a dataset.

esriDatasetType DatasetType { get; }

Property Value

esriDatasetType

Sample Snippet

IsOwnLock

Is the lock from the current connection.

bool IsOwnLock { get; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

LockMode

The mode of the lock.

esriSdeLockMode LockMode { get; }

Property Value

esriSdeLockMode

Examples

Sample Snippet

LockOwner

The user that owns the lock.

string LockOwner { get; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

LockTime

The time when the lock was acquired.

object LockTime { get; }

object

Examples

Sample Snippet

LockType

The type of lock.

esriSdeLockType LockType { get; }

esriSdeLockType

Sample Snippet

ObjectID

The ID of the locked object.

long ObjectID { get; }

Property Value

long

Sample Snippet

ObjectName

The name of the locked object.

string ObjectName { get; }

string

The session that owns the lock.

int SessionID { get; }
